issue.title: sandbox.co
issue.body:
**Issue type:** Incorrectly blocked domain (false positive in AdGuard DNS server-side filtering)

**Domains affected:** `sandbox.co` and `api.sandbox.co` (whole-domain block)

**What happens:** AdGuard public DNS sinkholes both hosts to the block page on the Default AND Family Protection servers, while the Non-filtering server resolves them correctly:

```
$ dig sandbox.co @94.140.14.14 +short    # AdGuard DNS Default
94.140.14.33
$ dig sandbox.co @94.140.14.140 +short   # AdGuard non-filtering
172.67.208.122
104.21.91.22

$ dig api.sandbox.co @94.140.14.14 +short
94.140.14.33
$ dig api.sandbox.co @94.140.14.140 +short
104.21.91.22
172.67.208.122
```
(94.140.14.33 = ad-block.dns.adguard.com block page; captured 2026-07-07)

**Why this is a false positive:** sandbox.co hosts **Sandbox**, a legitimate B2B SaaS platform (go-to-market workspaces), served via Cloudflare. `api.sandbox.co` is its REST API — blocking it breaks the application entirely for AdGuard DNS users. The domain appears in **none** of the public filter lists AdGuard aggregates (checked the AdGuardSDNSFilter build and all Hostlists Registry lists, plus oisd/HaGeZi/StevenBlack/EasyList/URLhaus/OpenPhish — zero exact-domain hits), so the block appears to come from AdGuard's server-side dangerous/parked-domains database.

The likely cause is **stale reputation**: the domain was a parked ad page for years (~2019-2025) and was acquired and relaunched as this product in early 2026. McAfee TrustedSource had the same stale "Parked Domain" classification; recategorization requests have been filed there as well. Google Safe Browsing and Norton SafeWeb both rate the domain clean, and the former wildcard DNS record is gone.

**Request:** please remove `sandbox.co` (and subdomains) from the DNS filtering database or recategorize it as a legitimate business/SaaS domain.

(Attempted to file via reports.adguard.com but the screenshot upload step repeatedly failed with "Something went wrong", so filing directly — the dig transcript above is the full repro.)

issue.title: Rotating Domains Checker: Updating domains
issue.body:
Rotating Domains Checker: Updating domains

🔄  Watchers with active mirror changed:

iNat TV (inattv*.xyz)            inattv1316.xyz       → inattv1317.xyz      

✅ Unchanged watchers:
     Fmovies (fmovies.*) (www.fmovies.gd), Belestepe (belestepe*.sbs) (belestepe615.sbs), Jmanga (jmanga.*) (jmanga.casa), HDFilmCehennemi (hdfilmcehennemi*.org) (hdfilmcehennemi27.org), voe.sx (pamelachangemission.com), HiMovies (himovies.*) (himovies.bz), Zonatmo (zonatmo.*) (zonatmo.to), OnionPlay (onionplay.*) (onionplay.st), VidMoly (vidmoly.*) (vidmoly.biz), Mapple-1 (mapple.*) (mapple.rip), Mapple-2 (mapplee.com) (mapplee.com), Sadeceifsa (sadeceifsa*.lol) (sadeceifsa16.icu), Hdturkifsa (hdturkifsa*.icu) (hdturkifsa54.cfd), Cimcime (cimcime133.live), MaçtanMaça (mactanmaca512.sbs)

🚨 Errors (no replacements made):
     - Vegamovies [https://vegamovies.hot/?re=vg]: Antibot detected: 403 or __cf_chl_tk in URL (1.50s)
     - Patronmac (patronmac*.cfd) [https://patronmac96.cfd]: Antibot detected: 403 or __cf_chl_tk in URL (1.37s)


📋  View detailed log: https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/actions/runs/28893254870#artifacts

---

## Changes
- Updated domain names in filter rules
- Updated watchers.yml with new last_known_mirror values

## Verification
Please review the changes before merging.

---
*This PR was created automatically by Rotating Domains Checker*

comment.body: @Alex-302 Hmm... Looks like `patronmac96.cfd` is being flagged malicious by Cloudflare so the script marked it as failed? Should we manually change the `failed_since` lines?

Который при включенном adguard не проигрываются, сколько бы я не нажимал на кнопки, мышку или перезагружал сайт. Видео проигрываются, только если отключить блокировщик и не обновить 2-3 раза страницу ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/50tx39f2ihgcgk8ss0w8g44gckocoko5fxs8l1tm2s.png?nc=1) [Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/6ju2y5monqg4ck80w8ok0oksgowsgk8pxlg66hntc0.png?nc=1) ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Mini for Mac v2.2.1.1053 System version: | `MacOS 15.7.7 (Выпуск 24G720)` Browser: | Safari License type: | free Advanced rules: | disabled Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
